description: Style NoteYour western formal wear wardrobe was missing an item it did not know about. This shirt from scullers is a must for your office wear because of its sharp look and stylish cut. Pair it with a pencil skirt or formal trousers and wear shoes to go along for a cool and collected professional look. Product DetailsBlue shirt with a spread collar, has a full buttoned placket, curved hemline and long sleeves with buttoned cuffs Material and Care100% cotton Machine wash or hand wash cold using a mild detergent with like colours Do not bleach Tumble dry low or dry in shade Use warm iron Size and FitRegular fit The model (height 5'8" and chest 33") is wearing a size M
